generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor receiving input current (I_M) and producing torque (τ_M) for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission transforming torque and angular velocity between motor and cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing high-precision torque transmission with backlash compensation capabilities."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller executing control algorithms for separate axis control with position, speed, acceleration, and motor current inputs/outputs."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision position encoder mounted on motor shaft providing angular position data for backlash and elasticity compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftEncoderData
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox providing angular position data for torque/velocity estimation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputEncoderData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to derive motor torque (τ_M) via motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorShaftEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of motor shaft angular position via MQTT protocol."
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of gearbox output angular position via MQTT protocol."
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of motor input current (I_M) via MQTT protocol."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing structural components (Motor, Gearbox, Axis) and their interconnections (rotational and current flows)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating the FirstAxis system with specific components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal_gearbox)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB for joint friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model implemented in MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB for dynamic friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box Dahl friction model implemented in MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB for hysteresis effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box LuGre friction model implemented in MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB for detailed friction dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance FrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ideal frictionless gearbox model for baseline behavior comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model deriving torque, angular velocity, and acceleration from encoder data using manufacturer-provided parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance GearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model estimating gearbox output torque (τ_G and τ_out) from motor input and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series of measured input current (I_M) from MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredRMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor output torque/velocity (r_M) derived from MotorShaftEncoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredRGData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox output torque/velocity (r_G) derived from GearboxOutputEncoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxOutputEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values (τ_rM, τ_rG, τ_rOut) processed through friction-aware dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

instance FrictionParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic friction parameters (Coulomb, viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) derived from model deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredIMData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkModelingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural (BDD) and logical (IBD) architecture modeling of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService, SystemInstantiationService
]

instance SimulinkModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB for executable simulation models of friction and system dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionSimulationService, DynamicsSimulationService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, encoder outputs) with traceability metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataAcquisitionService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML-based Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) for traceability and metadata management of data points."
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityManagementService, MetadataManagementService
]

instance UnifiedDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for displaying data traces, deviations, and system behavior visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, OperationalMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing SysML Block Definition Diagrams for structural component modeling."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance SystemInstantiationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service instantiating the first axis system with specific components via SysML Internal Block Diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemInstantiationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service acquiring real-time sensor data via MQTT protocol for immediate processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight
]

instance FrictionSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service combining white-box and black-box friction models for dynamic friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance DynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating frictionless and friction-aware system behavior for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicsDeviationInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating mechanical, electrical, and friction-related behaviors into cohesive multi-physics models."
    DTDFVocab:provides MultiPhysicsIntegrationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking data points to their sources, processing models, and system properties via DSRM."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityLinkInsight
]

instance MetadataManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing metadata including source identification, time intervals, and configuration states."
    DTDFVocab:provides MetadataInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service displaying data traces (torque, angular velocity) and deviations in unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance OperationalMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service detecting anomalies (e.g., unexpected torque drops) via dashboard visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural component relationships and interconnections defined via SysML BDD."
]

instance SystemInstantiationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "First axis system instantiated with specific components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal_gearbox) via SysML IBD."
]

instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, encoder outputs) via MQTT protocol with traceability metadata."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in gearbox via model deviation analysis."
]

instance DynamicsDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between simulated (frictionless/friction-aware) and measured system behavior."
]

instance MultiPhysicsIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated mechanical, electrical, and friction-related behaviors into cohesive multi-physics model."
]

instance TraceabilityLinkInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data points linked to sources, processing models, and system properties via DSRM."
]

instance MetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata including source identification, time intervals, and configuration states managed."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data traces (torque, angular velocity) and deviations displayed in unified dashboard."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies (e.g., unexpected torque drops) via dashboard visualizations of r vs. τr deviations."
]

instance FrictionCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Provides data-driven friction compensation inputs for Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ControlAlgorithmImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Indirectly influences physical twin by improving control algorithms via friction-aware insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIK840DslController,
                MotorShaftEncoder, GearboxOutputEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram, SysMLInternalBlockDiagram, CoulombViscousFrictionModel,
                StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, FrictionlessGearboxModel,
                MotorDynamicsModel, GearboxDynamicsModel, MeasuredIMData, MeasuredRMData, MeasuredRGData,
                SimulatedTorqueData, FrictionParametersData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical (DT→PT) interaction is absent** in this digital shadow implementation. The DS is a **one-way data flow system** (per Kritzinger et al. [32]), meaning it **does not send commands, corrections, or adjustments back to the physical system**. However, the **insights generated by the DS** (e.g., friction model improvements) can be **manually integrated into control algorithms** (e.g., via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl) to indirectly improve PT performance."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time (online)** with:
    - **Continuous data acquisition**: Sensor data (e.g., *I_M*, encoder outputs) is streamed via **MQTT** with **high temporal resolution** (not explicitly quantified but implied to be **sub-millisecond to millisecond** for control purposes).
    - **Dynamic model updates**: Friction models are **continuously identified and refined** during operation to account for **wear, tool changes, or environmental factors** (e.g., temperature).
    - **Synchronization**: The DS **does not actively synchronize with the PT** (passive system), but **data traces are time-stamped** for retrospective analysis. The **dashboard provides live visualization** of deviations between simulated and measured data."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is a **purpose-driven, centralized system** with:
    - **Single Asset Focus**: The DS is **specific to the first axis** of the MABI MAX 100 robot, with no horizontal or vertical scaling described.
    - **Component Orchestration**:
        - **Sources**: Physical sensors (encoders, current sensors) and **virtual sources** (simulation models).
        - **Processing**: Centralized **Simulation components** (*Simulation M*, *Simulation GW*, *Simulation GB*) that consume input traces and produce output traces.
        - **Models**: Linked via **DSRM associations** (e.g., *DataTrace* → *Processing* → *Model*).
    - **No External Integration**: The DS is **isolated** from other systems (e.g., no ERP, MES, or other DTs mentioned)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DS include:
    - **As-operated phase**: The DS is **not a pre-manufacturing or design tool** but is **operational**, focusing on **real-time monitoring and friction analysis during runtime**.
    - **No as-designed or as-manufactured phases**: The DS does not model the **ideal (CAD) or manufactured (tolerances) states** but instead **compares simulated vs. measured data** to identify **operational deviations** (e.g., due to wear or friction).
    - **Continuous evolution**: The DS supports **dynamic updates** to friction models (e.g., via **online parameter identification**) to adapt to **changing physical conditions**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
    - **Model Fidelity**:
        - **White-box models** (analytical, e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) provide **physically interpretable parameters** but require **manual tuning**.
        - **Black-box models** (data-driven) **eliminate parameter identification** but lack **explainability**.
        - **Hybrid approach**: Combines both to **balance accuracy and interpretability**.
    - **Validation Mechanisms**:
        - **Deviation analysis**: Compare **simulated (ˆ*r*) vs. measured (*r*) data traces** to quantify errors.
        - **Traceability**: Links data points to **sources, processing models, and system properties** for debugging.
        - **No formal verification**: No mention of **certification, testing protocols, or uncertainty quantification** (e.g., Monte Carlo simulations).
    - **Error Sources**:
        - **Unmodeled dynamics** (e.g., gearbox elasticity not separately measured).
        - **Sensor noise** (e.g., encoder resolution limits).
        - **Environmental factors** (e.g., temperature, wear) not explicitly quantified."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical connection** between PT and DT is:
    - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for **real-time, low-latency data streaming** from PT sensors to the DS.
    - **Architecture**:
        - **Centralized**: All data flows into a **unified processing system** (Simulink, dashboard).
        - **No cloud/edge distinction**: Assumed to be **on-premise** (no remote hosting mentioned).
    - **Data Format**:
        - **Time-series arrays** of torque (*τ*), angular velocity (*ω*), and current (*I_M*).
        - **Metadata** (source, timestamp, system properties) stored alongside data traces.
    - **No API/Service Bus**: Direct **point-to-point MQTT connections** from sensors to DS components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **hosting/deployment** details are:
    - **On-premise deployment**: The DS is **not cloud-hosted**; all processing (Simulink, dashboard) occurs **locally** on the robot’s control infrastructure.
    - **Hardware**: Assumed to be **co-located with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller** (no specific hardware mentioned).
    - **Software Stack**:
        - **Simulink/MATLAB** for simulation models.
        - **MQTT broker** for data streaming.
        - **Dashboard** (likely a **custom web-based UI** or **Siemens-specific tool**) for visualization.
    - **No containerization/virtualization**: No mention of **Docker, Kubernetes, or VMs**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
    - **SysML** (for **system modeling**, per [17], [27]) as the **architecture description language (ADL)**.
    - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (UML-based, per [15], [38]) for **conceptual modeling and traceability**.
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** (implied but not detailed) for **model-data integration** (per [AAS standard]).
    - **No explicit industry standards**: No mention of **ISO, IEC, or OPC UA** for interoperability or security."
]
